# Code of Conduct

We value the participation of every contributor and want smbgen to be welcoming, inclusive, and friendly.
By participating in this project, you agree to abide by this code of conduct.

## Our Standards

Examples of behavior that contributes to a positive environment:

- Using welcoming and inclusive language
- Respecting different viewpoints and experiences
- Gracefully accepting constructive criticism
- Focusing on what is best for the community

Examples of unacceptable behavior:

- Harassment, intimidation, or discrimination
- Insults, personal attacks, or hateful language
- Public or private harassment of any project participant
- Disruptive or unhelpful behavior in issues, pull requests, or other channels

## Reporting

If you experience or witness unacceptable behavior, please report it to the maintainers by opening a private GitHub Security Advisory or a private issue marked clearly as a conduct concern.

## Enforcement

Project maintainers are responsible for enforcing this code of conduct. We may take action at our discretion, including:

- Requesting changes to behavior
- Closing or blocking issue activity
- Removing contributors from the project
- Banning users from the repository

## Attribution

This Code of Conduct is adapted from the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/).
